settings.tagline: Brush, spray, massage. One tool. Done.

settings.title: Product Details
settings.value_1: 1× grooming brush with integrated water reservoir
settings.value_2: All coat types — short, medium, and long
settings.value_3: Dogs and cats of all breeds
settings.value_4: Varies by tool — see product detail

settings.title: How to Use
settings.content: Use gentle, slow strokes in the direction of hair growth. For deshedding tools, work section by section from neck to tail. Reward your pet after each session — consistency makes it easier every time.

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Care & Cleaning
settings.content: Rinse bristles or tines under warm running water after each use. Remove accumulated hair from the tool before washing. Allow to fully air dry before storage.

settings.name: All Coat Types
settings.description: Suitable for short, medium, and long coats — dogs and cats. Designed to work on any texture.

settings.name: Gentle by Design
settings.description: Soft-tipped bristles and rounded edges protect sensitive skin. Grooming should feel like bonding.

settings.name: Easy to Clean
settings.description: Removable bristle heads and smooth housings that rinse clean in seconds.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
